center.name: 瓜达卢佩岛
center.summary: 瓜达卢佩岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Ainley's storm petrel，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in the winter on Guadalupe Island off the western coast of Mexico

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It breeds in the winter on Guadalupe Island off the western coast of Mexico
